properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v2 v2 v3 v5

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: In every season You give me life, You shine through the darkness You are my light My death you defeated You gave me new life You've taken my sorrow My joy is in Christ.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: 'Cause when I'm with You I come alive My day's full of color I dance through the night When I see You move I follow Your lead My eyes are on You And Yours are on me

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: You give me joy, You give me joy, You give me joy, You give me joy.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: My sin beyond measure, Your grace was the cure, In You I'm victorious, My future is secure.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Overflowing, Your joy is overflowing in me.
